steps.title: Keep the name attached
steps.content: The phrase American geologist needs the name Marie Tharp to complete the identification. Because the name is essential, no punctuation should separate the role from the name.

steps.title: Remove separating punctuation
steps.content: Choices A, C, and D insert punctuation between geologist and Marie Tharp, incorrectly breaking up the essential noun phrase. The remaining choice keeps American geologist Marie Tharp together before the appositive that follows. The answer is B.
